location: Guaranteed drop from a Bloodfiend Hexer standing in a shallow pond near Taylew's Ruined Forge in Rauh Base. The Hexer is one of several Bloodfiends (plus a couple of dogs) gathered around the water; you must pick the item up after the kill.
tactics: Find the pond near Taylew's Ruined Forge in Rauh Base — several regular Bloodfiends and a couple of dogs patrol the water alongside the Hexer.
Only the Bloodfiend Hexer (the one performing blood rituals and casting bloodflame hexes) drops the spear; the other Bloodfiends carry different weapons and won't drop it.
Fighting the whole pack at once is dangerous — try to pull enemies individually or use the pond's terrain to avoid being surrounded.
Their attacks build blood loss quickly, so watch your bleed meter or bring blood-resistant gear into the fight.
lore: This is the ceremonial spear of the bloodfiend hexers, central to their blood rituals. The hexers see it as a means of communing with the Formless Mother, the outer god their tribe pledged themselves to after being spared from war and transformed into bloodfiends.

builds.name: Arcane Bleed
builds.why: Arcane scaling (C rising to B) drives both attack power and its bleed buildup, making it a strong long-reach poke for bleed-focused Arcane builds.

builds.name: Strength/Arcane Hybrid
builds.why: Modest Strength and Dexterity requirements let it slot into a mixed quality-arcane build without heavy stat investment.
